items.topic_thesis: To found trust without building a cult, leaders must transgress, recognize, release, and submit.
items.angle: Name the concept, explain it plainly, and show why it matters now.
items.hook: The mistake leaders keep making is thinking to found trust without building a cult, leaders must transgress, recognize, release, and submit.

items.topic_thesis: Game Tape Review makes public wrongness safe while errors are still cheap.

items.topic_thesis: The One-Man Job makes organizations more efficient and less socially coherent at the same time.

items.hook: The mistake leaders keep making is thinking the one-man job makes organizations more efficient and less socially coherent at the same time.

items.topic_thesis: The Hinge is the procedural myth a system lives from but cannot justify from inside itself.

items.topic_thesis: AI independence and distributed work shrink the surface area where trust used to form by accident.
